title: FontPackCaxton-LXGW
description: Use the stylized LXGW WenKai Screen font in your game!
body:
# WenKai Screen Font Pack — Enhance Your Gaming Text with Elegance


The WenKai Screen Font Pack is a specialized font collection designed to improve the readability and visual comfort of in-game text. Derived from the original Xiaowu Wenkai (霞鹜文楷) font, WenKai Screen is tailored specifically for display on PC and Android screens. The standard weight of the original Xiaowu Wenkai Regular was found to be too thin for optimal display on PC and Android devices; therefore, the WenKai Screen Font Pack adapts the bolder attributes of the Xiaowu Wenkai Bold variant to the Regular weight, while adjusting the metrics to match those of the default Android font, Roboto. This makes it particularly well-suited for use on both PC and Android mobile device screens.

Inspired by the style often seen in Japanese textbooks, WenKai Screen combines elements of traditional Chinese Song (宋体) and Kai (楷体) styles. The font carries a certain “literary charm,” which is reflected in its name, Xiaowu Wenkai (霞鹜文楷).

By incorporating WenKai Screen into your gaming experience, you can enjoy a more comfortable and aesthetically pleasing text presentation, whether you're reading quest descriptions, chatting with fellow players, or simply navigating menus. The font's versatility across languages and its compatibility with various gaming platforms make it an excellent choice for gamers around the world.requires Caxton to be loaded.
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1297ae1248c09ddebba0f9807f28463196e8af8a.png)
# License Info
This font is a modification based on the FONTWORKS Klee open-source project, which is developed and released under the SIL Open Font License 1.1. Klee is a trademark of FONTWORKS.

[LxgwWenKai霞鹜文楷](https://github.com/lxgw/LxgwWenKai)
